abilities.name: fluffy
abilities.shortEffect: Damage from contact moves is halved. Damage from Fire moves is doubled.
abilities.effect: Damage from contact moves is halved. Damage from Fire moves is doubled.
abilities.flavorText: Halves the damage taken from moves that make direct contact, but doubles that of Fire-type moves.

abilities.name: run-away
abilities.shortEffect: Ensures success fleeing from wild battles.
abilities.effect: This Pokémon is always successful fleeing from wild battles, even if trapped by a move or ability.
abilities.flavorText: Enables a sure getaway from wild Pokémon.

abilities.name: bulletproof
abilities.shortEffect: Protects against bullet, ball, and bomb-based moves.
abilities.effect: Protects against bullet, ball, and bomb-based moves.
abilities.flavorText: Protects the Pokémon from ball and bomb moves.
